creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/fusefs-ntfs/#message>

The message will benefit from a hint such as this: 

# sysrc kld_list+=fusefs

Thank you

(I'll make a separate bug report for README.FreeBSD, which is outdated.)

----

Ref: bug 263782, bug 264477, fusefs(5) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=fusefs&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD>, sysrc(8) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=sysrc&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD> and the FreeBSD Handbook <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#using-ntfs> | <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/disks/#using-ntfs>
